text:
- update 2.003 -> 2.005
ChangeLog: https://metacpan.org/dist/Test-Prereq/changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.

- Tested with:
14.2-RELEASE
portlint 2.22.5
portfmt 1.1.5
pkg 1.21.3
poudriere-git-3.4.99.20250101
perl 5.36.3_2
openssl 3.0.15
ssl=base

- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
